description: Indicates whether the company has been assessed by MSCI Solutions on MSCI Business Involvement Screening Research data.

Indicates the security was newly added to the parent GIMI index since the last Index Review (IPO other early inclusion or size-segment migration).
Indicates the security was created as a result of a spin-off from an existing index constituent.
Indicates the security is an existing index constituent being acquired in an M&A event.
Indicates whether the acquiring company in an M&A event is itself an index constituent.
